title: Hipat Whistle, 6 Pack Stainless Steel Sports Whistles with Lanyard, Loud Crisp Sound Whistles Bulk Great for Coaches, Referees, and Officials
features: PACKAGE--- 6PCS stainless steel metal whistles with lanyards.
LOUD CRISP SOUND--- The sound is loud and crisp, you can quickly catch the crowds attention anytime you want.
FREE YOUR HANDS--- Each whistle comes with a black lanyard, you can hang easily around your neck, or on a wall mount, helps you free your hand.

PREMIUM QUALITY--- 100% High-quality & food-grade stainless steel, safe, durable and sturdy to use, much better than the plastic whistles. The solid stainless steel whistle won't readily rust or corrode.
GOOD SERVICE--- All our whistles are 100% satisfaction guaranteed. These whistles are great for referees, coaches, training, teachers, survival, emergency, school, gym, etc.
description: Product Description Easier to use than traditional pealess whistles, the cork pea makes it easy to blow a loud, crisp sound every time, even if you're a little out of breath. Great for coaches and referees alike, the demonstrative shrill cuts through crowd noise and player chatter with ease. Wear it on or off the braided lanyard, and adjust the length with the yellow adjustment bead. You can use it easily and effectively in any situation. STAINLESS STEEL, NEVER NICKEL Many coaches’ whistles are nickel plated and easily show wear and tear from the elements and time of use. Our whistles are solid stainless steel that don’t rust or corrode. Leaving it looking shiny and new. CONVIENT TO USE A light and comfortable nylon lanyard comes with each whistle. You can wear it around your neck, wrist, or even on your backpack. You can adjust the yellow bead to control the length of the lanyard. Find the setting most comfortable for you and lock it in. PERFECT FOR COACH AND REFEREE Whistles with a pea are just easier to use. It’s science! The pea affects the flow of air, creating a loud, shrill sound with less air pressure. If you are a coach or a referee and you need a professional whistle, then our stainless steel whistle will be your BEST choice. WIDELY USED sports whistle(basketball, volleyball, football, soccer etc.), referee whistle, coach whistle, teacher whistle, guard whistle, lifeguard whistle, emergency whistle, survival whistle, self-defense whistle, police whistle, kid’s whistle, safety whistle, party favors whistle, water whistle, boating whistle 2PCS Stainless Steel Whistles 2PCS Plastic Whistles 2PCS Plastic Whistles 12PCS Whistles 12PCS Plastic Whistles Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 10,945 4.4 out of 5 stars 4,343 4.4 out of 5 stars 13,866 4.5 out of 5 stars 2,713 4.5 out of 5 stars 1,981 Price £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £7.99 £ 7 . 99
